title: Latina Baddie Mod
description: Once Installed Adds a New Biome Called the Latina Baddie Biome Along with New Tools And Armor
body:
New Biome: The Latina Biome
Explore a lush landscape dominated by massive 2x2 Cherry Trees. This biome is the primary source of the mod’s new materials,

New Mob: Latina Baddie
The groves are inhabited by the Latina Baddie entity. While they may seem passive at first, they have a pack mentality.

Neutral until Provoked: If you attack one, the entire group will swarm you.

High Difficulty: They deal significant damage, so come prepared with high-level gear.

New Resource: Latinium
Deep beneath the surface (and within the new biome), you can find Latinium Ore. This rare metal can be forged into a new tier of powerful equipment:

Latinium Sword: High durability and next to no cooldown.

Latinium Pickaxe: With a insane durability

Latinium Axe: Large damage and durability.

Latinaium Shovel: Fast Breaking

Latinaium Hoe: great for farming


Coming Soon!
Dimionsion: i'm working on adding a custom dimension for it
